---
title: "my two cents"
permalink: "/blog/my-two-cents"
categories: ""
layout: postpage
bibliography: refs.bib
link-citations: true
scholar:
  locale: en
output:
  md_document:
    variant: gfm
    preserve_yaml: true
    dev: "png"
    df_print: default
csl: citations.csl
---

> Happiness lies not in how you spent the day, but what you come home to. 

[Edit](https://github.com/rajiv256/rajiv256.github.io/edit/main/_posts/2026-06-17-my-two-cents.Rmd)
